ai-2.en: What part of your work carries your taste?

ai-5.en: What do you notice that others miss?

ai-6.en: What do you sense before you can explain it?

ai-7.en: What have you learned through experience?

ai-8.en: What can only be learned by doing?

ai-13.en: What are you proud to be reliable at?

ai-14.en: What are you proud to be gentle with?

ai-15.en: What are you proud to be strict about?

ai-16.en: What do people trust you with?

ai-17.en: What do people ask you to explain?

ai-18.en: What do people ask you to decide?

ai-19.en: What do people ask you to make better?

ai-24.en: What kind of attention does your work need?

ai-25.en: What kind of attention do you need?

ai-26.en: What do you want more credit for?

ai-27.en: What do you want less credit for?

ai-28.en: What has changed without being named?

ai-30.en: What would you never automate in yourself?

ai-31.en: What do you hope these tools reveal?

ai-32.en: What do you hope they never flatten?

ai-33.en: What would make work feel more human?

ai-34.en: What would make work feel less human?

ai-35.en: What do you want to practice next?

ai-36.en: What do you want to pass on?
